creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-06 08:05:04 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/pear-Mail_mimeDecode Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Provides a class to deal with the decoding and interpreting of mime messages.
  This package used to be part of the Mail_Mime package, but has been split off.
  
  WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/Mail_mimeDecode
  
  PR:             ports/114275
  Submitted by:   Zhen REN <bg1tpt at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.855     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/mail/pear-Mail_mimeDecode/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/pear-Mail_mimeDecode/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/mail/pear-Mail_mimeDecode/pkg-descr (new)
